Charles Hoskinson Fires Back at Critics, Defends Cardano Ecosystem
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the American co-founder of Cardano, responded to negative comments about how he’s ruining Cardano’s ecosystem and perception. On an X (formerly Twitter) post, Hoskinson replied to a user by the name of Swan.ada, who shared negative opinions about Cardano and Hoskinson in particular. The user said that Hoskinson is seen as a liability […] The post Charles Hoskinson Fires Back at Critics, Defends Cardano Ecosystem appeared first on Coin Edition.
